{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/73600142?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/34selen", "id": 73600142, "login": "34selen", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjczNjAwMTQy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/34selen", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54304", "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Impact
An authenticated user with permission to create or modify workflows and access to a SecurityScorecard credential with limited allowed domains could configure the SecurityScorecard node's report download operation to target an attacker-controlled URL. The node attached the SecurityScorecard API token to the outbound request, causing the credential to be sent to the attacker-controlled host bypassing credential configured limitations and exfiltrating.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.55, 2.25.7, and 2.26.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Limit workflow creation and editing permissions to fully trusted users only.
- Disable the SecurityScorecard node by adding `n8n-nodes-base.securityScorecard` to the `NODES_EXCLUDE` environment variable.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00353, "percentile": 0.27502}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T23:34:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54304"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-23T17:17:06Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T23:34:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54304", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: SecurityScorecard Node Leaks API Token to User-Controlled Host", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T13:44:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rm2v-h48j-895m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.55", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.55"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.26.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.0, < 2.26.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.25.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.25.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: SecurityScorecard Node Leaks API Token to User-Controlled Host
